name: 09c · Agent w/ crashing tool (feedback)
description: Live e2e for subworkflow-failure-propagation, agent path. An Agent whose only tool is 08c-unwired-failure (a sub-workflow that always crashes). onToolError=feedback. When the tool crashes, the child NetFailed must propagate to the agent and come back as a TOOL-ERROR fed into the loop (the LLM sees 'tool failed: ...') so the agent can retry/adapt — the agent net must KEEP RUNNING and complete, NOT crash. Requires 08c to seed first (alphabetical). Uses Ollama qwen3.5:9b.
